hero.subtitle: Rank for the searches that matter, strengthen site foundations, and publish content that compounds into traffic, enquiries, and revenue over time.

details.title: A simple, streamlined process from idea to final delivery.
details.card1Desc:
Tell us what you need.
- Share your goals, style & references
- We define scope, timeline & budget
details.card2Desc:
We shape your vision.
- Creative direction & video concept
- Structure, shots & overall style
details.card3Desc:
We get everything ready.
- Schedule, script, location & crew
- Equipment & production setup
details.card4Desc:
We bring it to life.
- Professional filming
- Direction & execution on set
details.card5Desc:
We craft and deliver your final video.
- Editing, color & sound
- Revisions included
- Ready-to-use final files

subFeatures.title: What Goes Into
subFeatures.item1Desc: We shape the visual direction, tone, references, and overall concept so the final video feels aligned with your brand and campaign goal.
subFeatures.item2Desc: Key messages, scene flow, hooks, and shot planning are mapped out before production so filming stays efficient and purposeful.
subFeatures.item3Desc: Professional on-set production with camera operation, direction, lighting, and captured footage built for clean, usable edits.
subFeatures.item4Desc: We turn raw footage into polished content through editing, pacing, transitions, colour work, subtitles, and sound refinement.
subFeatures.item5Desc: Videos can be adapted into different lengths and formats for Instagram, TikTok, ads, websites, and other digital placements.
subFeatures.item6Desc: You receive ready-to-use export files organised for launch, with revisions included so the final result is practical as well as polished.

caseStudy.title: Real Results for Real Businesses
caseStudy.case1Problem: The business had strong visuals in-store but no polished video assets online. Their launches lacked momentum, social content felt inconsistent, and the brand was not translating well across digital channels.
caseStudy.case2Problem: The brand was posting regularly but without a clear video system. Content quality varied, retention was low, and most posts failed to turn attention into bookings.
